titleStmt.title: SII 22.291A: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 291A. (A.R. No. 291-A of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA I—21st YEAR (A.D. 1032-33)

summary.p: This has also the same introduction Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara etc. The latter portion of the record is very much damaged. It seems to register a sale of two villages as śālābhōga to the temple at Tirumālpēṟu in Valla-nāḍu a division of Dāmaṟkōṭṭam by the Peruṅguṟi-sabhā of Nittavinōda-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Menmalai [Mēlūr-kūṟṟam] in Jayangoṅḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam in consideration of 1300 kāśu which seems to have been received by them from Kōvaṉ Kumaraṉ alias Daṇḍanāyakan Madhurāntakavēḷāṉ, an officer of the royal treasury who was a native of Marudāḍu alias Vikramaśōḻanallūr in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam. Some disconnected pieces of writing are also found in the same place, which seem to have formed part of this inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyappāvai yum cirttaniṟ celviyum taṉ perun=teviyarāki yiṉpuṟa neṭutuyar ruḻiyuḷ ḷiṭai tuṟaināṭu
ntuṭarvaṉavelipaṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷicūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyum māṅkavaṉ
teviyaroṅkeḻilmuṭiyum muṉṉavarpakkaṟ ṟeṉṉavaṉ vaitta cun=tara muṭiyum In=tiranāramum teṇṭirai Iḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipa
ṭai keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālai caṅkatir velai to
l peruṅkāvaṟp palapaḻan=tivu[*m] ceruviṟciṉavil Irupattorukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ me
varuñ cān=timaṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟ ṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅ koṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyal mutukiṭ
ṭoḷitta jayaciṅka ṉaḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiya liraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum navanetikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarakoṭṭa
mu mutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭai vaḷaiya nāmaṇaikkoṇaiyum veñciṉavirap pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭai paḻaṉ mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇ kirtti yāti nakaravaiyuṭ cantiraṉ ṟolkulat tintira Irataṉaiy viḷaiyamark kaḷattuk kiḷaiyo
ṭum piṭittup palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiṉaḷai yoṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurarcer nalkkocalaināṭum taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇuṟattākki tikkaṇai
kirtti takkaṇalāṭamum kovintacan=taṉ māviḻin toṭat taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkoṭṭal mayipāḷaṉai veñcamarviḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi yoṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭu
ṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalarttirtta teṟipuṉaṟk kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celutti caṅkirāmavicaiyoṟṟuṅka paṉmaṉākiya kaṭārattaraiyaṉai vākayam porukaṭalk kumpak kariyoṭu makap
paṭutturimaiyiṟp piṟakkiya perunitip piṟakkamum Ārttavar nakarp port toḻil vācalil viccātirat toraṇamum moyttoḷir puṉamaṇipputavamum kaṉamaṇikkatavamum niṟai
śrī vicaiyamum tuṟainirppaṉṉaiyum paṉmalaiyūraiyiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūru neṭu kaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkā cokamum kāppuṟuniṟaipuṉal māppappāḷamum kāva
lampuricai mevilipaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷappantūrum kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamum tiytamāval(la)viṉai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmutir kaṭun tiṟalilāmuṟitecamum teṉakkavārpoḻil māṉakkavāramum toṭuka
ṭaṟkāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭkaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecari paṉmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī Irājendracoḷadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 1Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu melmalaiymelūr kūṟṟattu nittavinotacaturvedima
ṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyyeḻuttu veṇ kuṉṟakkoṭṭattu marutāṭunāṭṭu marutāṭāṉa vikkiramacoḻanallūruṭaiyāṉ ciṟu taṉattupperun=taṉam kovaṉ kumaraṉāṉa taṇṭanāyakaṉ maturā
n=taka veḷāṉukku Ivaṉ tāmarkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭu tirumāṟpeṟṟu Ātidāsa śaṇḍeśvararpakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟuk kācu Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟukkum Ittevarc cālāpokamāka ṉāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭut
ta Ūrkaḷāvaṉa Eṅkaḷūrt teṉpiṭākai ṭṭuppākkamum mañci ṉpāṭiyu kku kiḻpāṟkellai Eṅkaḷūr piṭākai parameśvaramaṅkalat tellaikku meṟkkum pu
The rest is very much damaged. The following three disconnected pieces seem to be connected with this inscription.

vāykkālum Ivvūriraṇṭukku pāñcuvarum nirum vāykkālum melnokkiya maramum kiḻnokkiya kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Ivviraṇṭūrilum Uṭumpoṭi Āmaiy tavaḻn=ta nilam Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟi Eppeṟppaṭṭatum Emmi licain=ta vilai ṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu .—ippaṭi yaṟive
pporuḷukkum Iṟaipporuḷukkum Āka Āyirattu muṉṉūṟu kācum kaik koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ivvūr Iraṇṭum Icuṭṭiṉa Iṟaiy koyil vācalāṟ pon=ta kuṭimaiy Epperppaṭṭatum Ivaka Āṭṭaik kuṭimaiy Iṟukkumpotu Ivvū ciriḷaṅkovaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu .

—peṟṟuṭaiya Ivviraṇṭumāka Itte
—l nilamuṭaiya brāhmaṇarkkum Eṅkaḷūr
—ppeṟuṭaiyār koyilil vaicca ni
—ttaṉum kuṇṭur tevanampi kramavi
—uṭaimaiypeṟup peṟātomākavum
—sabhai paṇikka Ivvūrk karaṇattāṉ can=ti
—ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ ciṅkaḷān=takac ca
turvetimaṅkalattu madhyasthaṉ nālā
yiratteṇṇūṟṟuva brahmappiriyaṉeṉ
Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi yaṟiviya
kuṇamāteva nampikkiramavittaṉeṉ Ivai

—iṟaiyātoru kuṭimaiy kāṭṭāmaikku naravira Ivvūr
—tevarkaḷukkum mā Ivvūr nilamuṭaiyārkkum nala
—laikkuc cālāpokamāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañcey
—ttaṟum paṇiyāl Ipparicu tirumālppeṟuṭai
Digital edition of SII 22.291A by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
